chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Necessitates Discretionary Punishment, Legal Punishment, Stoning, Execution, and Exile in Adultery

text:
:
"اَلشَّيْخُ وَ اَلشَّيْخَةُ جُلِدَ مِائَةً وَ اَلرَّجْمَ وَ اَلْبِكْرُ وَ اَلْبِكْرَةُ جُلِدَ مِائَةً وَ نَفْيَ سَنَةٍ وَ اَلنَّفْيُ مِنْ بَلَدٍ إِلَى بَلَدٍ وَ قَدْ نَفَى أَمِيرُ اَلْمُؤْمِنِينَ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَجُلَيْنِ مِنَ اَلْكُوفَةِ إِلَى اَلْبَصْرَةِ ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4997 - Hammad narrated from Al-Halabi who reported from Abu Abdullah (as) that he said: "An elderly man and an elderly woman are to be flogged one hundred lashes and then stoned.
A virgin man and a virgin woman are to be flogged one hundred lashes and exiled for a year. The exile is from one city to another.
Indeed, Commander of the Faithful (as) exiled two men from Kufa to Basra."
